commit_scope: Route public GET /api/inventory/flow through the BML front-door kernel service as a narrow path-specific native ingress. The BML service now mounts the production config carrier needed for pg_connect, and deploy verification requires native inventory observation instead of silently accepting the FastAPI payload.

commands: git fetch origin main && git rebase --autostash origin/main
local_validation.notes: Shell syntax, source-only verifier load, diff check, evidence validation, autostash rebase on origin/main, local PR guard, and strict followthrough guard passed. The earlier public probe after PR #2676 proved production still served /api/inventory/flow through FastAPI with no X-Form-Router and no native_observation; this change adds the missing path-specific Traefik rule and production config mount for the BML service.

ci_validation.notes: Remote CI is pending until this branch is pushed and a PR is opened.

deploy_validation.notes: Public deploy will be validated by scripts/verify_web_api_deploy.sh, which now fails unless /api/inventory/flow returns X-Form-Router: native-kernel and native_observation.handler=api_inventory_flow.

phase_gate.notes: Local syntax, verifier-source proof, rebase, local PR guard, and followthrough guard are pass. Commit, push, PR, CI, merge, deploy, and public verification remain.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: After deployment, ordinary public GET /api/inventory/flow should be served by the BML front-door kernel service and prove native_observation.python_authority=false.
test_flows: Traefik has a higher-priority path rule for Host(api.coherencycoin.com) && Method(GET) && Path(/api/inventory/flow) pointing at coherence-api-kernel-bml-front-door.
kernel-router-bml-front-door mounts /root/.coherence-network/config.json as KERNEL_ROUTER_CONFIG_FILE so api_inventory_flow can read production Postgres.
auto-deploy.sh locally probes the BML front-door inventory route for native headers, handler=api_inventory_flow, python_authority=false, and an empty canary item list.
verify_web_api_deploy.sh now probes the public inventory route and fails unless it reaches X-Form-Router: native-kernel with native inventory observation.

evidence_refs: deploy/kernel-router/docker-compose.kernel-router.yml routes GET /api/inventory/flow to coherence-api-kernel-bml-front-door with priority 1190.
deploy/hostinger/auto-deploy.sh locally probes the inventory route inside kernel-router-bml-front-door before declaring canary proof.
scripts/verify_web_api_deploy.sh defines check_inventory_flow_native and calls it during public deploy verification.
bash -n passed for deploy/hostinger/auto-deploy.sh and scripts/verify_web_api_deploy.sh.
VERIFY_WEB_API_DEPLOY_SOURCE_ONLY=1 source load passed for scripts/verify_web_api_deploy.sh.
worktree_pr_guard local mode passed with ready_for_push=True.
check_pr_followthrough strict mode passed with stale_codex_prs=0.
